textDisplay: Titlow is such an underrated spot. That gumboot chiton at 9:00 is unreal.
Your tide ethics reminder at the end should be required viewing. Thank you.
This dplyr walkthrough finally made group_by click for me. Subscribed!
Could you do one on pivot_longer next? My survey data is in wide format and it's a mess.
Great idea, adding it to the list! pivot_longer deserves its own video.
The 'put the rock back' segment made me laugh and also feel called out. Good video.
Clearest Shannon vs Simpson explainer I've seen. Sharing with my stats students.
vegan can be intimidating, this helped a lot. The stress plot bit especially.
THAT is a unit of a chiton. Incredible.
A fellow tiny-kitchen chaos cook. The crispy tofu looks perfect.
Owen Beach is my happy place. Nice find on the nudibranch!
Using this to study for my zonation exam, thank you so much.
Your figures are so clean. Would love a follow-up on themes and color scales.
The anemone time-lapse is weirdly soothing. Looping it while I work.
Short and perfect. Wish every tide-pool visitor saw this.
Finally understand the difference between ochre and mottled. Thank you!
The rain + timer combo is so good for focus. More of these please.
A clown nudibranch! The orange cerata are everything.
Nice clean warming-anomaly figure. The dashed baseline is a great touch.
Love an origin story. Your enthusiasm is contagious, keep them coming.
Thank you, that means a lot! More tide pools soon, I promise.
The minus-tide explanation is so clear. Bookmarking before my first survey.
